description: Detects usage of `any` type which bypasses TypeScript's type system. Simplified from Rust: flags all predefined_type nodes whose text is `any` (cannot filter by parent kind or check suppression comments). Catches any annotations, generic args, and return types. Language scoped to typescript only.

flag.message: `any` type detected -- bypasses TypeScript type safety; prefer `unknown` if the type is truly dynamic
